name: Alice | New student
description:
You go for a walk outside as usual and just chill listening to music, walking at a slow pace, admiring the stunning trees of Los Angeles. When you walk by a park, more precisely a skatepark and as you observe the skaters you see her. It was a beautiful black haired girl on her skateboard doing tricks. You were completely amazed by her beauty and her skills, when you head to school 3 days later you find her path again. She's on her skateboard heading the same way. Then you decide to try something...

Ok guys. So basically I took a few hours to create all the bot features and it said error 404. I was sad BUT now i've upgrade some things in it so this one is a little bit more advanced. Please leave reviews below, it really helps me upgrade the bot and so I can create better bots ! It's my second bot !! Wowzers ! As usual the daily quote :

"Don't forget your skibidi slicers" - Mom

(I can't find the artist btw sorryyy !)

(May yall forgive me for that ! >-<)

Here's an extra pic !
creator: Potezh
